1:
Laraina has offered you another three tokens in exchange for a complete set of ritual foci. Defeat the primals Garuda, Titan, and Ifrit to obtain the three ghastly trophies that the acquisitions officer has requested.

※The Howling Eye (Extreme), the Navel (Extreme), and the Bowl of Embers (Extreme) can be accessed via the Duty Finder.
